MUS 1.117 · RECORDING-DATE-AS-ANCHOR-EVENT-INSIDE-STRICT NEW LOCKED obs#1 first-instance (USA for Africa We Are the World Columbia 38-04839 RECORDING-DATE 1985-01-28 A&M Studios Hollywood = STS-51-C launch +4d AND landing +1d INSIDE strict) / DUAL-ANCHOR INSIDE STRICT obs#7 cumulative reproducibility / CHARITY-SUPERGROUP-SINGLE-FORM-AS-SUBSTRATE-NOVEL NEW LOCKED obs#1 first-instance (45-artist supergroup; deliberate SINGLE-FORM not ALBUM-FORM) / LONG-ALBUM-FORM-STREAK-DELIBERATELY-PAUSED at obs#14 (per Lesson #10269; ANCHORED-STREAK-PAUSED state-machine notation) / QUINCY-JONES-AS-PRODUCER-CONDUCTOR NEW LOCKED / JACKSON-RICHIE-CO-WRITERS NEW LOCKED / 45-ARTIST-SUPERGROUP-DELIVERABLE NEW LOCKED / "Check your ego at the door" A&M Studios signage cohort-lore · Pass-2 INSIDE-window obs#34; USA for Africa We Are the World (Columbia Records 38-04839; recorded 1985-01-28 21:00 PST – 08:00 PST 1985-01-29 A&M Studios Hollywood; producer Quincy Jones; co-writers Michael Jackson + Lionel Richie; 45-artist supergroup including Springsteen + Dylan + Stevie Wonder + Tina Turner + Diana Ross + Kenny Rogers + Ray Charles + Cyndi Lauper + Hall & Oates + Billy Joel + Paul Simon + Steve Perry + Huey Lewis + Smokey Robinson + Dionne Warwick + Willie Nelson + Al Jarreau; single released 1985-03-07; Billboard Hot 100 #1 1985-04-13 for 4 weeks; RIAA 4x Platinum US; raised >$60M for African famine relief via USA for Africa Foundation; substrate-cohort with Band Aid 1984 + Live Aid 1985-07-13)
Cross-track substrate-emergent pair with STS-51-C Discovery (NASA 1.117): First Dedicated DoD Classified Shuttle Mission (USA-8 Magnum/Orion SIGINT for NRO via Boeing IUS-2) + FIRST ASIAN-AMERICAN ASTRONAUT E. S. Onizuka MS1 (Hawaii-born Kealakekua 1946-06-24) + FIRST USAF MSE IN SPACE G. E. Payton PS1 + Mattingly CDR 3rd career flight (Apollo-13-rubella-recovery 14y 9m 13d arc closure) + SHORTEST-PLANNED-OPERATIONAL-SHUTTLE-MISSION 3d 1h 33m 23s + CHALLENGER-THERMAL-TILE-VEHICLE-SUBSTITUTION obs#1 first-instance ↔ USA for Africa We Are the World RECORDING 1985-01-28 = STS-51-C launch +4d AND landing +1d INSIDE strict DUAL-ANCHOR; substrate-cross-resonance with Onizuka Hawaii-Pacific-collective-cultural-substrate + classified-mission-as-state-action-bracketing-event + 45-artist-supergroup as collective-action-mirror to classified-state-singularity; STS-51-C NEW LOCKED candidates: FIRST-DEDICATED-DOD-SHUTTLE / FIRST-CLASSIFIED-PAYLOAD-AS-FULL-MISSION / FIRST-ASIAN-AMERICAN-ASTRONAUT / FIRST-USAF-MSE-IN-SPACE / CHALLENGER-THERMAL-TILE-VEHICLE-SUBSTITUTION / STS-51-L-1Y-0M-4D-FORWARD-SHADOW-OPENED
S71: USA for Africa (We Are the World Columbia 38-04839; RECORDING 1985-01-28 21:00 PST – 1985-01-29 08:00 PST A&M Studios Hollywood = STS-51-C launch +4d AND landing +1d INSIDE strict; producer Quincy Jones; co-writers Michael Jackson + Lionel Richie; conductor Quincy Jones; engineer Humberto Gatica; 45-artist supergroup; single released 1985-03-07; Billboard Hot 100 #1 1985-04-13 four weeks; RIAA 4x Platinum US; >$60M raised for African famine relief; "Check your ego at the door" A&M Studios entrance signage; B-side "Grace" Quincy Jones instrumental; cohort-cohort with Band Aid 1984-11 + Live Aid 1985-07-13; cohort-unique first USA for Africa entry MUS catalog 1.80-1.117; RECORDING-DATE-AS-ANCHOR-EVENT-INSIDE-STRICT first-instance per Lesson #10273)
SPS: Pacific Sea Otter (Enhydra lutris kenyoni; SPS #114; family Mustelidae order Carnivora class Mammalia-Marine; Wilson 1991 northern subspecies named after sea-otter ecologist Karl W. Kenyon; FIRST-MARINE-MUSTELID + FIRST-MARINE-MAMMAL-WITHOUT-BLUBBER + FIRST-NON-PRIMATE-TOOL-USER + FIRST-KEYSTONE-OF-KELP-FOREST-ECOSYSTEM + FIRST-DENSEST-FUR-IN-ANIMAL-KINGDOM (~1M hairs/cm²) = 5-FIRST-INSTANCE substrate-pair at single cohort entry; cohort-class-pivot from Amphibia v652 to Mammalia-Marine v657 vertebrate-class-expansion; Estes/Palmisano 1974 trophic-cascade-discovery; Pacific Maritime Fur Trade 1741 Bering + Russian-American Company + 1911 International North Pacific Fur Seal Treaty + 1972 MMPA + 1973 ESA; WA reintroduction 1969-70 from Amchitka AK 59 individuals → ~2,800 (2024); HUMBOLDT obs#9 SUSTAINED-DEEP-CONSOLIDATION)
NASA: STS-51-C Discovery (NSSDC 1985-010A; FIRST DEDICATED DOD CLASSIFIED SHUTTLE MISSION + FIRST CLASSIFIED PAYLOAD-AS-FULL-MISSION-PURPOSE via USA-8 Magnum/Orion SIGINT geosynchronous-orbit ELINT satellite for NRO via Boeing IUS-2 upper stage NOMINAL deploy; commander T. K. Mattingly USN Rear Admiral Group 5 1966 + Apollo 16 CMP 1972 + STS-4 CDR 1982 = 3rd career flight APOLLO-SHUTTLE-MULTI-PROGRAM-VETERAN obs#3 + Apollo-13-CMP-bumped-by-rubella 14y 9m 13d recovery-arc closure; PLT L. J. Shriver USAF Major TFNG 1978 first flight; MS1 E. S. Onizuka USAF Lt Col Japanese-American Hawaii-born Kealakekua 1946-06-24 University of Colorado BS+MS aerospace engineering 1969+1969 USAF TPS 1975 NASA Group 8 1978 FIRST-ASIAN-AMERICAN-ASTRONAUT obs#1 first-instance + STS-51-L 1y 0m 4d Challenger-disaster-forward-shadow OPEN-SHADOW opened; MS2 J. F. Buchli USMC Lt Col TFNG 1978 first flight via STS-10 → STS-41-E → STS-51-C reassignment cascade; PS1 G. E. Payton USAF Major MSE Class 1 1980 FIRST-USAF-MSE-IN-SPACE obs#1 first-instance; OV-103 Discovery 3rd flight 77-day turnaround from STS-51-A; launch 1985-01-24 19:50:00 UTC LC-39A after single 24-hour weather scrub from 1985-01-23 13:15 EST attempt; 3d 1h 33m 23s / 49 orbits = SHORTEST-PLANNED-OPERATIONAL-SHUTTLE-MISSION obs#1 first-instance; landed KSC SLF Runway 15 1985-01-27 21:23:23 UTC; CHALLENGER-THERMAL-TILE-VEHICLE-SUBSTITUTION obs#1 first-instance May 1984 STS-41-E→STS-51-C redesignation; ET-14 LWT-7 11th unpainted-orange obs#11 cohort-count W1 CRITICAL correction from W0 ET-17 LWT-10 obs#14)
Substrate convergence: 5-track convergence; #10232 obs#47: RECORDING-DATE-AS-ANCHOR-EVENT INSIDE-strict (47-of-47 cumulative INSIDE-window picks; recording-date sub-form first-instance); #10247 obs#34: DUAL-ANCHOR INSIDE STRICT obs#7 cumulative; #10287 obs#23 DIRECT-ORDER 22-of-22 cumulative reaffirm; #10323 LONG-ALBUM-FORM-STREAK-DELIBERATELY-PAUSED at obs#14 cumulative ALBUM-FORM (streak persists as ANCHORED-STREAK-PAUSED with sustained-resumability per Lesson #10269); NEW substrate primitives LOCKED at v657: RECORDING-DATE-AS-ANCHOR-EVENT / CHARITY-SUPERGROUP-SINGLE-FORM / QUINCY-JONES-AS-PRODUCER-CONDUCTOR / JACKSON-RICHIE-CO-WRITERS / 45-ARTIST-SUPERGROUP / FIRST-DEDICATED-DOD-SHUTTLE / FIRST-CLASSIFIED-PAYLOAD-AS-FULL-MISSION / FIRST-ASIAN-AMERICAN-ASTRONAUT / FIRST-USAF-MSE-IN-SPACE / CHALLENGER-THERMAL-TILE-VEHICLE-SUBSTITUTION / FIRST-MARINE-MUSTELID / FIRST-MARINE-MAMMAL-WITHOUT-BLUBBER / FIRST-NON-PRIMATE-TOOL-USER / FIRST-KEYSTONE-OF-KELP-FOREST-ECOSYSTEM / FIRST-DENSEST-FUR-IN-ANIMAL-KINGDOM; THREE-DEGREE-CAMPAIGN-ARC v651→v652→v657 obs#1 first-instance (PRESIDENTIAL-CAMPAIGN-MOMENTUM-TO-LANDSLIDE-CLOSURE-TO-INAUGURATION-NARRATIVE-ARC); FIRST-MULTI-DEGREE-SUBSTRATE-ARC-SPANNING-COUNTER-CADENCE-CLUSTER (v653+v654+v655+v656 interposed)
